title: GROUP_LEAVE: TOCTOU between remove_group_member and delete_group
description: ws.rs GROUP_LEAVE handler reads member_count() after remove_group_member() and deletes the group if count == 0. Between these two calls, a concurrent GROUP_ADD could add a new member, making the count non-zero in the DB but 0 in the local read -- or the opposite race where two concurrent GROUP_LEAVE calls both read count==1 and both attempt delete_group. The delete_group call is not atomic with the membership removal (separate transactions). Fix: move remove + count + conditional delete into a single SQL transaction, or use a DELETE...RETURNING pattern.
